body.body: Directly addresses 5139 orphaned nodes exposed by D199 work. New FACTUAL/EPISODIC nodes auto-linked to appropriate CP/ID parents via habit. See GitHub #318.
body.title: Memory-to-interpretive-tree linking habit (#318) — connect orphaned FACTUAL/EPISODIC to CP/ID parents
body.result: HeartbeatSource._run_orphan_adoption() added to push_sources.py — runs every 5min when IGOR_NODE_ADOPTION_ENABLED=true, calls cortex.adopt_orphans(batch_size=50), logs ORPHAN_ADOPTED on activity. PROC_NODE_ADOPTION habit seeded (CP1 parent, action type, code_ref=tools.graph_ops:run_node_adoption) for on-demand dispatch. Both gated by IGOR_NODE_ADOPTION_ENABLED. seed script at claudecode/seed_linking_habit.py.
